 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

 Test 3 : compute |log(Gamma(z+1))-log(Gamma(z))-log(z)| for 10000 random values of z, which are
 	  uniformly distributed in the square |Im(z)|<20, |Re(z)|<20
 maximum error=   5.24758482186838180199072532797283759E-0032
 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

 Test 8 : compute zeta(1/2+i*t_k) for the first five non-trivial zeros 1/2+i*t_k of zeta(s) at height t=10^6
    note that these zeros are only correct to 10^{-9},
    so the values of zeta(1/2+i*t_k) should be of the same order of magnitude
